title: Coastal Morning
activity: Read the lines slowly, then sing or speak them with a relaxed pulse.

title: Mangrove Groove
activity: Clap the beat and speak each line with strong stress on the content words.

title: Data Blues
activity: Speak the lines like a blues phrase and exaggerate final consonants.

title: Trombone Air
activity: Take one calm breath before each line and connect the words naturally.

title: Real Song Study: Here Comes the Sun
focus: Warm vowels, simple present, hopeful tone
activity: Open an official lyric/video source, listen once for mood, then collect five useful words without copying the full lyrics into the app.
lines: Practice phrase: The light returns after a long season.
Practice phrase: I can hear a brighter rhythm today.

title: Real Song Study: What a Wonderful World
focus: Slow diction, descriptive adjectives, emotional delivery
activity: Listen for nouns and colors. Write your own short description of a natural landscape in English.
lines: Practice phrase: I see green leaves and open water.
Practice phrase: The world sounds calm when I listen slowly.

title: Real Song Study: Lean on Me
activity: Listen for phrases about help and friendship. Then write two supportive sentences in English.
lines: Practice phrase: You can count on me when the work is hard.
Practice phrase: We learn better when we help each other.

title: Real Song Study: Three Little Birds
activity: Focus on rhythm and repeated reassuring language. Create your own calm sentence for study days.
lines: Practice phrase: Take your time and breathe through the phrase.
Practice phrase: Small steps can make the morning easier.
